name: Formatear lista de puertos
Guardar puerto seleccionado
Puerto serial
format:
<md-input-container class="md-block">
    <label>Puerto Serial</label>
    <md-select ng-model="item.puerto" ng-change="send({payload: item.puerto, topic: 'rtu_port'})">
        <md-option ng-repeat="p in msg.payload" value="{{p.value}}">
            {{p.label}}
        </md-option>
    </md-select>
</md-input-container>
